step1.title: Quick call
step1.description: 10-15 min call to understand your business and goals.

step2.title: We build a demo
step2.description: Demo in 24-48 hours with your brand styling applied.

step3.title: You send materials
step3.description: Send us your content via our simple checklist.

step4.title: We launch
step4.description: Launch, testing, and ongoing subscription maintenance.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What do you need from me?
faq.a1: Your logo, brand colors (if any), text content, and images. We'll guide you through everything with a simple checklist.
faq.a2: Demo in 24-48 hours. Full site launch typically within 1-2 weeks depending on how quickly you provide materials.
faq.q3: Can you connect Booksy or other booking tools?
faq.a3: Yes. We add clear "Book now" buttons linking to your booking page. If your platform provides an embed widget, we can embed it as an add-on. We can link to booking tools. Embeds depend on provider. Custom integrations are scoped separately.
faq.a4: We keep the site online, secure, and updated (hosting + SSL, backups, essential updates). Content changes are available within the included monthly time.
faq.a5: Yes, we build fully localized sites with language switchers. Additional languages are available as an add-on.
faq.q6: Can you migrate my existing site?
faq.a6: We can preserve your content while giving you a fresh, modern design. Migration is available as an add-on.
faq.q7: What if I don't like the demo?
faq.a7: No obligation. If the demo doesn't fit your vision, you pay nothing.

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheadline: Subscription websites for appointment-based businesses. Demo first, no risk.
pricing.currency_note: Prices shown in local currency for convenience. Final pricing depends on billing country, taxes, and scope.

pro.name: Pro
pro.includes_note: Includes Standard plan + Monthly Growth add-on

included.headline: What's included
monthly: Minor content updates within time limit

excluded.headline: Not included (available as add-ons or hourly)
items: Advanced SEO, link building, ads management

extra_edits.headline: Extra edits
extra_edits.description: Edits beyond included monthly time are billed in 15-minute blocks:
extra_edits.note: Unused included minutes do not roll over. One consolidated request per month preferred.

hourly.headline: Non-standard work
hourly.description: Used only for requests outside plans and listed add-ons:

checklist.headline: What we need from you
items: Booksy link or preferred booking method

terms.headline: Terms

structure_approved.title: Structure approval
structure_approved.description: After you approve page structure, adding new pages/sections or changing layout is out of scope and billable.

minor_updates.title: Minor content updates include
items: Short notice text within existing sections

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.description: Minimum term applies. After minimum term: month-to-month, cancel anytime with 30 days notice. Early exit during minimum term requires buyout fee.

third_party.title: Third-party platforms
third_party.description: Third-party platforms (e.g. booking tools, email providers) are managed by their providers. We assist with links and setup within scope.

third_party_costs.title: Third-party costs
third_party_costs.description: Not included: domain registration, email hosting, paid plugins, stock photos, ad spend.

template_based.title: Template-based delivery
template_based.description: We use proven templates for speed and predictable pricing. We customize brand and content within that system.

invoicing.title: Invoicing
invoicing.description: We invoice as an Estonia-registered company. Billing details are confirmed before invoicing.

no_guarantees.title: Results disclaimer
no_guarantees.description: Results depend on many factors. We follow proven best practices, but cannot guarantee specific outcomes.

terms.setup_note: Setup fee applies once per site.

process_page.headline: Our process
process_page.approach_desc: We build your site before you commit. See it, feel it, then decide.
process_page.ownership: Client owns their brand assets and content they provide. Site operates under subscription with ongoing maintenance. Domain and third-party accounts remain client's responsibility. Optional handover available as scoped add-on.

about_page.headline: About Mirai Design
about_page.intro: We're a focused team building websites that work. No fluff, no delays.
about_page.clarity_desc: Simple communication. No jargon. You always know what's happening.
about_page.speed_desc: Fast delivery without cutting corners. We value your time.
about_page.reliability_desc: We deliver what we promise. Every time.
about_page.demo_first_desc: See your site before paying a cent.
about_page.performance_desc: Every site is optimized for speed and search.
about_page.systems_desc: Proven workflows that get you live faster.

contact_page.headline: Let's talk
contact_page.subheadline: Ready to start? We usually respond within 3 hours.
